---
name: "push"
description: "Use when: pushing the repository to the next planned step, updating specs before drift, starting with tests when possible, and ending with a git commit. Keywords: push, next step, 推进下一步, 更新 specs, 先测试后实现, 最后提交."
argument-hint: "next scope or target"
agent: "agent"
---
# Push

Continue the workflow; otherwise start the work for the next feature.

Remember `Explore -> Spec -> Plan -> Code` workflow.
Remember update the relevant [specs/](../specs/).
Remember `Red -> Green -> Refactor` in coding.
Remember `Commit` at the end.
